Entered Date/Time: 09/12/2017 0635
Narrative: On 9/12/2017 Officers of the Metro Patrol Division responded to 1400 block of Rosetta Street in reference to a reported assault with a deadly weapon. Officers on scene located a male victim suffering from an apparent gunshot wound to the face. Medic pronounced victim deceased on scene. This incident occurred in the 2 Response Area of the Metro Patrol Division.

lines.content: Person/Individual (not acting as a Law Enforcement Officer)
Homicide / Murder: First or Second Degree Murder
On 9/12/2017 Officers of the Metro Patrol Division responded to 1400 block of Rosetta Street in reference to a
reported assault with a deadly weapon. Officers on scene located a male victim suffering from an apparent
gunshot wound to the face. Medic pronounced victim deceased on scene. This incident occurred in the 2
Response Area of the Metro Patrol Division.
